Question:
Search academic databases (arXiv, INSPIRE-HEP, etc.) for literature regarding the 'classicality of single-photon Hawking radiation'. Specifically, look for the identification of three universal dimensionless constants that govern this phenomenon. Once identified, provide the exact numerical values for these constants and cite the relevant theoretical papers.
